browse.title: Discover available resources
browse.subtitle: Search by text, refine with category and modality filters, and browse what people have to offer nearby.
browse.sortDescription: Current ranking mixes closeness (50%), freshness (30%), and sooner expiry (20%).
browse.searchPlaceholder: Try title, description, or creator name
browse.empty: No active resources match the current filters right now.

form.intensityHelper: Choose the same intensity scale used for needs.
form.imageUrlsHelper: Optional. Paste one or more image URLs separated by commas or new lines.
form.locationHelper: Shown to nearby people when they browse.
form.categoriesHelper: Choose from the fixed system-provided category list derived from the legacy product.
form.expiresAtHelper: Leave empty to keep the resource permanent.
form.subtitle: Share an object or service nearby. The optional token amount is only a negotiable starting point.
form.notFound: This resource was not found or is no longer accessible.

manage.title: Resources workspace
manage.subtitle: Your resources are shown with the most recently modified items first.
manage.empty: You have not published any resources yet.

deleteDialog.title: Delete resource?
deleteDialog.body: This will archive "{{title}}" from active listings.
